series_metadata.series_description: Forms completed each week for each investment account holder by a Compliance Examiner that lists the number and types of issues of incident, claims, and the analysis of the custodial confirmed reconciliation of assets (SEC-106). Supporting documentation is also attached to the worksheet where necessary. Information from this worksheet is then entered into the Custody Compliance Reporting Database (SEC-121).

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Retain until conclusion of current fiscal year, and for an additional 4 fiscal years. ; Electronic: Retain until conclusion of current fiscal year, and for an additional 4 fiscal years., Paper: Shred ; Electronic: Delete
